name: Warrior Trading
description_short: Day trading education platform founded by Ross Cameron with live chat rooms, structured courses, real-time trade alerts, and a simulated trading environment.
description_long:
Warrior Trading is one of the most prominent day trading education platforms, founded by Ross Cameron, who documents his journey from a $583 starting account to over $10 million in verified trading profits. The platform offers structured courses, live chat rooms, real-time trade alerts, and a proprietary trading simulator designed specifically for learning day trading strategies.

The educational content is organized into three tiers: Starter (basic concepts and market mechanics), Warrior Pro (advanced strategies including momentum, gap and go, reversal, and VWAP trading), and Warrior Inner Circle (mentorship-level access with Ross Cameron and senior moderators). Live chat rooms operate during market hours with real-time trade callouts and analysis.

Warrior Trading's simulator allows students to practice day trading in a realistic environment with Level 2 data, hotkeys, and fast execution — simulating the experience of trading with a real broker. The platform also provides stock scanners, watchlist alerts, and a community forum. However, the pricing is on the higher end ($997/year for Pro access), and some critics note that the educational content promotes aggressive trading strategies that carry significant risk.
pros: Ross Cameron's verified trading track record
Active live chat room during market hours
Structured curriculum from beginner to advanced
cons: Promotes aggressive day trading strategies (high risk)
Success rates for students are not publicly disclosed
Primarily focused on small-cap momentum trading
